title: Midnight Swede Melody
description: A tangy and velvety diabetic-friendly Syrian dish featuring swede roasted to perfection on the grill.
instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
Season the diced swede with salt and black pepper.
Toss the swede with olive oil until evenly coated.
Place the swede on the preheated grill for about 8-10 minutes, or until nicely charred and tender. Turn occasionally.
Remove from heat and allow to cool slightly.
Mix in the lemon juice to create a tangy glaze.
Serve warm as a side dish or over a bed of rice.
